title: Tatoo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tatoo''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Tatoo system]], the binary star system where [[Tatooine]] is located
**[[Tatoo I]], a [[star]] at the heart of the Tatoo system
**[[Tatoo II]], a star at the heart of the Tatoo system

==Legends==
*[[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]], the binary star system where [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] is located
**[[Tatoo I/Legends|Tatoo I]], a [[Star/Legends|star]] at the heart of the Tatoo system
**[[Tatoo II/Legends|Tatoo II]], a star at the heart of the Tatoo system
*[[Tatoo III]], a space station near Tatooine
*[[Tatoo (corvette group)]], a pair of [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]]

==See also==
*[[Tattoo]], a type of body art in [[Canon]]
**[[Tattoo/Legends]]
